name: Porki Poke
author: Poki
description: Porki Poké is a fun and tasty management game where you run your very own Poké bowl restaurant! Open up shop each day, serve delicious bowls to happy customers, clean up tables, and keep the business running smoothly. Use your earnings to upgrade your skills, hire helpful assistants, and expand your restaurant. Ready to build the ultimate Poké paradise? How to play Porki Poké? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Porki Poké? Porki Poké is created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: My Kitten Home , My Super Tiny Market , goal-training, Distraction Driver and Sticker Album ! How can I play Porki Poké for free? You can play Porki Poké for free on Poki. Can I play Porki Poké on mobile devices and desktop? Porki Poké can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
